mapper.update: update nursing_record set del_flag = '1' where nursing_record_id = #{recordId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select count(*) from nursing_record where customer_id = #{customerId} and del_flag = '0'
select count(distinct customer_id) from nursing_record where user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0' and nursing_date like concat(#{date}, '%')
mapper.update: update nursing_record set del_flag = '1' where nursing_record.customer_id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
update nursing_record set del_flag = '1' where nursing_record.user_id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
